title: PHOENIX PLACE - 211info
text: KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH WASHBURN PHOENIX PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides respite, residential care, and treatment for adults experiencing emotional and mental health crisis. 725 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 883-1030 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Walk-ins accepted for crisis services. FEES: OHP, Medicare, private insurance, sliding scale, payments DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: -Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. -Respite and residential programs: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Adult Out of Home Respite Care Adult Residential Treatment Facilities Crisis Residential Treatment In Person Crisis Intervention Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH WASHBURN
